LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WEYERHAUSER COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT JULIA E. MARKLEY PRO HAC VICE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE VERIFIED APPLICATION OF JULIA MARKLEY, AT PARAGRAPH 5, DOES NOT MAKE CLEAR WHETHER APPLICANT HAS APPLIED FOR OR BEEN ADMITTED PRO HAC VICE IN THE PAST TWO YEARS. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
